careers.title: Career opportunities

about.title: Shared passion - Harvesting success
about.description: Founded in 1999, Vietba Group is one of Vietnam's leading professional media consulting companies. We are proud to be the first company to bring internationally licensed gameshows to Vietnam, while pioneering in television production, digital marketing, and comprehensive media strategy consulting.
about.description2: For the growth of our valued clients, we are dedicated to providing practical media solutions at reasonable costs, focusing on effectiveness in brand promotion and optimizing the benefits of each brand in every campaign.

services.title: Diverse media services for your business

items.title: Comprehensive media strategy consulting
items.desc: Comprehensive media strategy consulting: positioning, building, developing, and defending brands.
items.detailDesc: With a team of top industry experts, Vietba Group provides comprehensive media strategy consulting for businesses. From brand positioning and communication planning to crisis management, we accompany our clients through every circumstance.

items.title: Technology & digital transformation
items.desc: Comprehensive digital transformation solutions, building modern technology platforms, AI systems, and e-commerce solutions.
items.detailDesc: Vietba Group provides comprehensive digital transformation solutions, from enterprise software and e-commerce platforms to AI applications. Our experienced engineering team delivers bespoke solutions tailored to each business.

items.title: Multi-platform content production
items.desc: Professional multi-platform content production: gameshows, sitcoms, children's programs, TVCs, music videos, viral clips, short films, and digital content.
items.detailDesc: With over 25 years of TV and multi-platform content production experience, Vietba Group pioneered bringing internationally licensed gameshows to Vietnam. From 'Wheel of Fortune VN' with 811 episodes on VTV3, to 'Brain Wall' (Japan), 'Fun Squad' (G-Wars, Japan), 'Light or Dark' (Heaven or Hell, Germany), 'Golden Goal' (Norway) — each show became a cultural phenomenon. Beyond gameshows, we produce children's programs with strong educational value like 'Good Night Baby', social sitcoms like 'Colors of Beauty' and 'Colorful Corners', plus hundreds of TVCs, music videos, and creative digital content.
highlights: 811 episodes of Wheel of Fortune on VTV3
Licensed formats from US, Japan, Germany, Norway

items.title: Weather & technology center
items.desc: Specialized weather forecasting, hydro-meteorological services, and disaster warning for power, aviation, agriculture, petroleum, maritime, and shipping industries.
items.detailDesc: Vietba Group's Weather & Technology Center provides specialized weather forecasting and hydro-meteorological data services for power, aviation, agriculture, petroleum, and maritime industries. Partnering with Japan's WNI and international agencies.

items.title: Digital marketing
items.desc: Comprehensive digital marketing: social media management, SEO, SEM, content marketing, performance ads, and building digital ecosystems for enterprises.
items.detailDesc: Vietba Group's digital marketing team provides comprehensive solutions from strategy to execution across all platforms. We have supported major brands like Bamboo Airways, EVN HCMC, VTD Smarthome, and CEDELAR in building and growing their digital channels. Services include: corporate page management, multi-platform content creation (Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube), performance advertising (Google Ads, Facebook Ads, TikTok Ads), website SEO, email marketing, and campaign data analytics. As an official Google and Facebook partner, we deliver optimal ROI for every budget.

items.title: Media booking
items.desc: Multi-channel media booking: television, radio, press, PR articles, online advertising, KOLs/Influencers, and an extensive nationwide partner network.
items.detailDesc: With an extensive media partner network built over 25+ years in the industry, Vietba Group provides comprehensive media booking services across all platforms. We are strategic partners of major TV networks (VTV, HTV, THVL, SCTV, VTVcab, Hanoi TV) and maintain a network of over 500 KOLs and influencers across multiple fields. Services include: TV advertising spot booking, PR articles in major publications, radio advertising, digital banners, program sponsorships, and influencer marketing campaigns. We optimize media budgets and measure effectiveness for every campaign.
highlights: Partners: VTV, HTV, THVL, SCTV, VTVcab

items.title: Outdoor advertising
items.desc: Strategic OOH advertising: billboards, LED displays, airport advertising, highway signage, vehicle wraps, and transit media at prime locations nationwide.
items.detailDesc: Vietba Group owns and manages a strategic network of outdoor advertising (OOH) locations nationwide, covering highways, city centers, airports, and bus stations. Our diverse product portfolio includes: large-format billboards at key intersections, LED screens at shopping centers and high-traffic areas, advertising at international airports (Noi Bai, Tan Son Nhat, Cam Ranh), highway signage along the North-South corridor, bus wraps, and transit media. Our experienced OOH consultants help clients select optimal locations and ad formats to maximize reach and frequency.

items.title: Event organization
items.desc: Full-service professional event organization: client conferences, product launches, roadshows, activations, gala dinners, teambuilding, and large-scale events.
items.detailDesc: Vietba Group organizes full-service professional events for 50 to 5,000+ attendees, serving diverse needs from annual client conferences and corporate anniversaries to product launches, nationwide roadshows, and brand activations. We have partnered with major corporations including Vietcombank (Annual Client Conference 2020, 55th Anniversary, Gala), Vietnam Airlines (Festa), USAID, and many other leading enterprises. Our end-to-end services include: concept & script development, stage & venue design, operations management, MCs & entertainers, sound & lighting, catering, live streaming, and post-event reporting.

items.title: Company founded
items.desc: On March 10, 1999, Vietba Media Development JSC was established - one of Vietnam's first professional media consulting companies.

items.title: Wheel of Fortune VN
items.desc: Vietba Media became the first company to bring licensed gameshows to Vietnam. The show aired continuously for 15 years with 811 episodes on VTV3.

items.title: Good night baby
items.desc: A children's program of profound educational value, airing daily at 9PM on VTV3. Blending entertainment with meaningful learning, 'Good Night Baby' became a cherished memory for generations of Vietnamese families, nurturing the hearts and imaginations of millions of children.

items.title: InvestTV launched
items.desc: InvestTV was Vietnam's first socialized TV channel on investment economics - an effective and impressive collaboration between VBG, the Ministry of Planning and Investment, and VTVcab.

items.title: Weather & technology center
items.desc: Launched the Weather & Technology Center, providing specialized forecasting services for power, aviation, agriculture, and petroleum industries.

items.title: Brain Wall Vietnam
items.desc: Sports-themed gameshow licensed from Japan's Brain Wall (Nookabe), aired from 2014–2020. A children's version launched in 2017.

items.title: MChannel launch
items.desc: On December 18, 2015, InvestTV transformed into MChannel - Vietnam's first TV channel exclusively dedicated to men's content.

items.title: Became Vietba Group
items.desc: On April 21, 2022, officially transformed into Vietba Group JSC with 1 headquarters, 2 representative offices, and 2 subsidiaries.

careers.title: Job openings
careers.subtitle: Join Vietba Group - where you grow your career with a passion for media.
careers.intro: Vietba Group was established in 1999 with 100% Vietnamese capital. Over 20 years of building and development, we have established our name in Vietnam's media industry. To this day, Vietba Group is among the TOP advertising and media companies in Vietnam.
careers.introSub: Vietba Group has become a trusted and effective partner for corporations and enterprises, prestigious TV stations, and renowned publications in the following fields:
careers.introAchievements: We have produced over 400 media advertising products, 50 outstanding TV programs, and are a trusted service provider for over 200 large and small partners. We are proud to be the first company to bring gameshows to Vietnam.

jobs.title: Head of digital marketing
jobs.summary: Vietba Group is seeking a Head of Digital Marketing – responsible for building and leading the overall Digital Marketing strategy, developing multi-platform content ecosystems including Television, Digital, Out Of Home, and social media platforms; while optimizing media resources to generate sustainable revenue for the business.
description: Develop Digital Marketing growth strategy by phases.
Deploy and operate a hybrid revenue model combining client services and digital platforms.
Manage data systems and track media performance across Digital platforms.
Manage revenue, profit, and be responsible for Digital business KPIs.
Participate in pitching and strategic media consulting for major brands.
Build, manage, and develop the Digital Marketing team.
requirements: Minimum 8–10 years of experience in Marketing or Media.
Experience as Head of Digital Marketing, Marketing Director, or equivalent.
Deep understanding of Digital Marketing, Social Media, Performance Marketing and traditional media such as Television, Out Of Home.
Experience in team building, integrated media planning, and effective business management.
Strategic thinking, proactive, ability to connect with major partners.
benefits: Income from 30,000,000 – 45,000,000 VND + sales commission + performance bonus.
Directly build strategy and develop the Digital team.
Work with leadership and participate in large-scale nationwide media projects.
jobs.workLocation: 3rd Floor, Hanoi Toserco Building, 273 Kim Ma, Hanoi

jobs.title: Content manager
jobs.summary: Manage and develop multi-platform content strategy, ensuring quality and brand consistency.
description: Build overall content strategy for media channels.
Manage content team and ensure content production timelines.
Develop monthly/quarterly content calendar and editorial plan.
Coordinate with Design and Video teams for high-quality content production.
Analyze content performance and optimize strategy.
requirements: Minimum 5 years of experience in Content Marketing.
Experience managing a content team of 5+ members.
Excellent writing and editing skills.
Knowledge of SEO, Social Media, and current content trends.
Creative thinking, ability to work under high pressure.
benefits: Opportunity to participate in major media projects.
jobs.workLocation: 3rd Floor, Hanoi Toserco Building, 273 Kim Ma, Hanoi

jobs.title: Growth & performance lead
jobs.summary: Lead Growth Marketing strategy, optimize ad performance and sustainable growth.
description: Build and deploy multi-channel Growth Marketing strategy.
Manage and optimize Performance Marketing campaigns (Google Ads, Facebook Ads, TikTok Ads).
Analyze data, measure KPIs and report campaign effectiveness.
Optimize conversion rate and customer acquisition cost.
Coordinate with Content and Creative teams to optimize creative assets.
requirements: Minimum 5 years of experience in Performance/Growth Marketing.
Proficient in Google Ads, Facebook Business Manager, Google Analytics.
Experience managing advertising budgets of 500M+ VND/month.
Strong data analysis skills and insight reading.
Ability to work with major brands, pitch and consult strategy.
benefits: Access to advanced marketing tools and platforms.
Career development opportunities in a leading media group.
jobs.workLocation: 3rd Floor, Hanoi Toserco Building, 273 Kim Ma, Hanoi

jobs.title: Sales director – HCMC branch
jobs.summary: Oversee business development and operations at the Ho Chi Minh City branch.
description: Build business strategy and develop the Southern market.
Manage branch sales team and ensure revenue targets.
Seek, develop, and maintain strategic client relationships.
Coordinate with headquarters to deploy media projects.

requirements: Minimum 7 years in business/sales, media industry preferred.

Extensive network with businesses and corporations in HCMC.

Dynamic, proactive, willing to travel.

jobs.summary: Find and develop clients, consult on suitable media solutions.
description: Find, approach, and develop potential clients.
Consult on media and advertising solutions matching client needs.
Build and maintain long-term client relationships.
Meet and exceed assigned sales targets.

weather.title: Weather & technology center
weather.subtitle: Specialized weather forecasting solutions and applied meteorological data for businesses

intro.title: Overview
intro.p1: Vietnam is one of the countries most severely affected by climate change and extreme weather events. In recent years, the frequency and intensity of storms, heavy rainfall, flooding, droughts, prolonged heatwaves, and saltwater intrusion have been increasing, causing significant damage to lives, property, infrastructure, and broadly impacting socio-economic development.
intro.p2: Vietba owns the Weather & Technology Center, specializing in providing industry-specific weather forecasting solutions, applied hydro-meteorological data, weather bulletins, and in-depth disaster warnings for major enterprises and corporations in the fields of: power, aviation, television broadcasting, agriculture, petroleum, maritime, and shipping.
intro.p3: In addition to its professional expertise, Vietba collaborates with reputable domestic and international forecasting agencies to enhance data quality, accuracy, and information update speed.

products.title: Key products

items.title: Voyage consulting
items.desc: Voyage consulting and vessel support services, providing critical weather information to help captains make optimal decisions, ensuring safety, fuel savings, emission reduction, and improved operational efficiency.

items.title: Port & island forecasting
items.desc: Providing daily weather forecasts for seaports, islands, and transit points, serving maritime transport and logistics operations.

items.title: Marine weather forecasting
items.desc: Providing marine weather forecasting services including waves, wind, currents, tides, and dangerous phenomena for maritime transport, fishing, and offshore petroleum operations.

items.title: Storm & disaster warnings
items.desc: Forecasting and warning of storms, tropical depressions, large waves, storm surges, fog, and other dangerous hydro-meteorological phenomena at sea.

extraServices: Short-term, medium-term, monthly, and seasonal forecasting; climate trend assessment and change evaluation
Research, application, and technology transfer for hydro-meteorological forecasting and warning
High-resolution, high-quality forecast bulletins with in-depth consulting
Data built on advanced Japanese forecasting models combined with National Hydro-Meteorological Service, satellite imagery, and radar

dataSources.title: Data sources
dataSources.desc: Vietba's forecasting system is built on an integrated platform of advanced domestic and international hydro-meteorological models:

models.name: US, Japan, Europe, Thailand, Germany, UK

partners.title: Data partners
partners.desc: Vietba currently partners with numerous reputable domestic and international hydro-meteorological and technology organizations:

list.name: National Center for Hydro-Meteorological Forecasting
list.desc: Government agency under the Vietnam Meteorological and Hydrological Administration, responsible for nationwide weather forecasting and disaster warnings.

list.name: Southern Regional HydroMet Center
list.desc: Regional forecasting center serving 18 southern provinces, utilizing automated observation stations and modern numerical models.

list.name: Center for HydroMet Technology Application
list.desc: Specialized provider of meteorological, hydrological, oceanographic and environmental observation equipment and technology solutions in Vietnam.

list.name: Weathernews Japan
list.desc: The world's largest private weather company, with a leading data system, offices in 21+ countries and a team of over 1,000 experts worldwide.

list.name: MetService New Zealand
list.desc: New Zealand's national meteorological authority and WMO member, providing 24/7 forecasting with nationwide radar and automated observation networks.

list.name: EarthTV Network GmbH
list.desc: Digital production and technology company operating a global network of live broadcast cameras, providing weather content for international broadcasters.

partners.wniHighlight: Weathernews (WNI) is the world's largest private weather company headquartered in Japan, with a network of offices in over 21 countries and 7 global service centers. WNI possesses the world's leading weather data system along with a team of over 1,000 experts.

experts.title: Expert team

lead.name: Le Thi Xuan Lan
lead.title: Master of Hydro-Meteorology
lead.bio: Many years of experience at the Southern Hydro-Meteorological Station. Specialized research on the East Sea, petroleum extraction zones, and maritime routes. Expert in waves, wind, atmospheric circulation, synoptic patterns affecting the East Sea, and application of numerical models in marine weather forecasting.

experts.teamDesc: Our team of experts and advisors are trained in-depth in Ocean Physics, Meteorology, Hydrology, and Marine Dynamics with PhD, Master's, and Engineering degrees to ensure the highest professional quality and accuracy.

communications.title: Comprehensive media strategy consulting
communications.subtitle: Partnering with businesses in every media campaign — from brand positioning to crisis management.

intro.title: Service overview
paragraphs: With a team of top industry experts and nearly 30 years of experience, Vietba Group provides comprehensive media strategy consulting for businesses. From brand positioning and communication planning to crisis management, we accompany our clients through every circumstance.

We have successfully consulted for over 2,000 clients, including international organizations such as USAID, major corporations like Vietcombank, Bamboo Airways, and many other prestigious enterprises across all sectors.

technology.title: Technology & digital transformation
technology.subtitle: Comprehensive digital transformation solutions, building modern technology platforms for enterprises.

intro.title: Service overview
paragraphs: Vietba Group provides comprehensive digital transformation solutions, from enterprise software and e-commerce platforms to AI applications. Our experienced engineering team delivers bespoke solutions tailored to each business.
We have successfully deployed over 50 technology solutions, including VTD Smarthome systems, the CEDELAR platform, InvestTV channel, and many other large-scale digital transformation projects.

production.title: Multi-platform content production
production.subtitle: Over 25 years pioneering TV and multi-platform content — from internationally licensed gameshows to sitcoms, TVCs, and digital content.

intro.title: Service overview
paragraphs: Vietba Group pioneered bringing internationally licensed gameshows to Vietnam. 'Wheel of Fortune' (licensed from the US) aired for 15 consecutive years with 811 episodes on VTV3, hosted by Lai Van Sam and Long Vu, becoming an iconic cultural phenomenon of Vietnamese television.

Building on this success, we produced a series of hit licensed shows: 'Brain Wall' (Japan) in 3 versions (original/kids/family), 'Fun Squad' (G-Wars, Japan) on VTV3, 'Light or Dark' (Heaven or Hell, Germany), 'Golden Goal' (Norway), and 'Tuesday Night Chat' (KBS, South Korea) on HanoiTV.

Beyond gameshows, Vietba also produced the beloved children's program 'Good Night Baby' on VTV3 with host Chi Kinh Hong — airing daily at 9PM, it became a cherished memory for generations of Vietnamese families. The sitcoms 'Colors of Beauty' and 'Colorful Corners' on VTV3 also left deep impressions with audiences.

highlights: Wheel of Fortune — 811 episodes on VTV3, hosts Lai Van Sam, Long Vu
Brain Wall — Licensed from Japan, 3 versions
Fun Squad (G-Wars), Light or Dark (Heaven or Hell)
Golden Goal, Tuesday Night Chat (KBS Korea)
Good Night Baby — VTV3, host Chi Kinh Hong
Sitcoms: Colors of Beauty, Colorful Corners — VTV3
Licensed formats from US, Japan, Germany, Norway, S. Korea
400+ TVCs, music videos, and creative digital content

gallery.caption: Light or Dark — Heaven or Hell

Our diverse product portfolio includes: large-format billboards at key intersections, LED screens at shopping centers, advertising at international airports (Noi Bai, Tan Son Nhat, Cam Ranh), highway signage along the North-South corridor, bus wraps, and transit media.

We have partnered with major corporations including Vietcombank (Annual Client Conference, 55th Anniversary, Gala), Vietnam Airlines (Festa), USAID, and many other leading enterprises. Our end-to-end services include concept & script development, stage & venue design, operations management, MCs & entertainers, sound & lighting, live streaming, and post-event reporting.
